title: Property Consultant - Indiabulls Real Estate - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Indiabulls Real Estate - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
